input.instruction: Implement updateState() for SineSpeedBall using xVelChanger and yVelChanger SineMaker objects. Cast the return value of getDVal() to int.

blocks.text: I have completed the assignment, passing all public tests. I implemented the MVC architecture for the ball animation system, specifically focusing on the Abstract Inheritance Pattern. My implementation included the `ABall` abstract class and its concrete subclasses: `BounceUpBall` (with horizontal scaling), `DVDLogoBall` (with color changing on bounce), and `SineSpeedBall` (with sinusoidal velocity changes). I also implemented the `BallModel` to handle ball generation and animation timing using `ObjectLoader` and `SequentialDispatcher`. All requirements from `instructions.md` have been fulfilled and verified.
